    Oregon Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

    164 senior living communities in Oregon. Pick your region — each color on the map is one region — and browse its communities city by city.

    What's available in Oregon

    • Assisted Living — 78
    • Memory Care — 73
    • Independent Living — 62
    • Skilled Nursing — 48
    • Respite Care — 28
    • Small Care Home — 23
    • CCRC / Life Plan — 13

    How Oregon regulates senior care

    Assisted living, residential care facilities, and memory care endorsements are licensed by ODHS Aging and People with Disabilities; Adult Foster Homes are the state's small-home option. Lookup: Oregon Department of Human Services, Aging and People with Disabilities.

    Oregon money questions

    • What senior living costs in Oregon
    • Does Oregon Medicaid pay for senior care?

      68 communities

      Beaverton, Canby, Forest Grove, Gresham, Happy Valley, Hillsboro, Lake Oswego, McMinnville, …

      49 communities

      Albany, Corvallis, Dallas, Eugene, Florence, Junction City, Keizer, Lebanon, …

    • Oregon Coast

      9 communities

      Astoria, Brookings, Coos Bay, Newport, North Bend, Seaside

    • Southern Oregon

      17 communities

      Ashland, Grants Pass, Klamath Falls, Medford, Roseburg

    • Central Oregon

      14 communities

      Bend, La Pine, Prineville, Redmond, Sisters

    • Gorge & Eastern Oregon

      7 communities

      Hermiston, Hood River, La Grande, Pendleton

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
